summary: V55.0 OmniCore Testing Complete. All 11 backend API tests pass (100%). All V55.0 features verified: Sacred Geometry SVG overlays (Sri Yantra, Metatron's Cube, Flower of Life), Sacred Breath mode with Fibonacci-timed Flower of Life expansion, Ghost Trails API (GET/POST endpoints), Toroidal room transitions, and spatial pages working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: V55.0 OmniCore fully verified. NEW components working: SacredGeometrySVG.js (Sri Yantra, Metatron's Cube, Flower of Life with data-testid attributes), GhostTrails.js (community presence with 30s stillness threshold), ghost_trails.py backend (in-memory storage by design). Sacred Breath mode on /breathing page works with Fibonacci-timed phases (1,1,2,3,5 seconds). Ghost Trails API: GET /api/ghost-trails/{room} returns trails/sparks arrays, POST /api/ghost-trails/update accepts room/user_id/position, POST /api/ghost-trails/leave-spark creates residue sparks. Toroidal room transitions use rotateY + blur animation in SpatialRouter. All spatial pages tested: /crystals (HOLLOW_EARTH), /games (default), /breathing (AIR).

tests_executed.details: Health OK, Crystals (12 crystals), Ghost Trails GET default, Ghost Trails GET custom room, Ghost Trails POST update, Ghost Trails POST update minimal, Leave Spark POST, Verify Spark Persisted, Verify Trail Persisted, Breathing endpoint, Meditation endpoint

Breathing mode toggle found, Sacred Breath tab found and clickable, Sacred Breath mode container renders, Flower of Life SVG (data-testid='flower-of-life') found, Begin/End Sacred Breath button toggles correctly, Patterns and Build Your Own tabs present

SpatialRoom (crystals) found, Sacred Geometry Overlay (data-testid='sacred-geometry-overlay') found, Sri Yantra SVG (data-testid='sri-yantra') found, Metatron's Cube SVG (data-testid='metatrons-cube') found, Flower of Life SVG found, Avatar Badge found, Fibonacci depth indicator (data-testid='fib-depth-indicator') found
SpatialRoom (default) found, Sacred Geometry Overlay found, Avatar Badge found
Navigation from /games to /crystals triggers toroidal transition (rotateY + blur animation in SpatialRouter), SpatialRoom changes correctly, Sacred Geometry Overlay persists after transition

GET /api/ghost-trails/default returns {trails:[], sparks:[], active_count:0}, POST /api/ghost-trails/update returns {status:'ok', active_in_room:N}, POST /api/ghost-trails/leave-spark returns {status:'ok', sparks_in_room:N}, Trails and sparks persist and are visible in subsequent GET requests

sacred_geometry_svg.sri_yantra: data-testid='sri-yantra' - 9 interlocking triangles with lotus petals
sacred_geometry_svg.flower_of_life: data-testid='flower-of-life' - Overlapping circles with breath-driven bloom

sacred_breath_mode.fibonacci_phases: 1, 1, 2, 3, 5 second phases (inhale, hold, exhale, deep-inhale, rest)

toroidal_transitions.animation: rotateY(15deg) + scale(0.92) + blur(4px) on exit, reverse on enter

mocked_apis.ghost_trails: Uses in-memory storage (not MongoDB) - this is by design for real-time presence
